description: NDF Plugin hooks: CLAUDE.ndf.md detection, transcript retention guard, and Slack notifications

SessionStart.description: Detect deprecated CLAUDE.ndf.md and warn user

hooks.command: if [ -f "${workspaceFolder}/CLAUDE.ndf.md" ] || [ -f "$HOME/.claude/CLAUDE.ndf.md" ]; then echo '[NDF] CLAUDE.ndf.md が検出されました。廃止済みです。/ndf:cleanup を実行して削除してください。'; fi

hooks.description: Send Slack notification when Claude Code exits
